name: How much money will I get if I can only work part-time now?

mainEntity.name: How much money will I get if I can only work part-time now?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should receive Temporary Partial Disability (TPD) benefits, which typically cover two-thirds of the difference between your old full-time pay and your new part-time earnings, helping to stabilize your income.
